title: Toad's Toolbox
description: Adds several new equipment items that you can find across your world!
body:
# Toad's Toolbox

Adds several new gadgets and equipment items that you can find across your world! These include the Magic Mirror, a useful tool that allows you to teleport to your spawn point, the Breeze in a Jar, a dash item that lets you maneuver in the air, and more!

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- Magic Mirror - Found in Stronghold Libraries. Can be used to teleport back to your spawn position.
- Ender Mirror - Can be bound to a location. Allows you to teleport back to the mirror's bound location at any time.
- Cascade Striders - Found in Buried Treasure chests. Increases your movement speed and allows you to walk on water!
- Slime Boots - Removes fall damage and lets you bounce back up from long falls.
- Night Vision Goggles - Enhances your ability to see in the dark.
- Breeze in a Jar - Found in Trial Vaults. Allows you to dash twice midair with a short cooldown.

</details>

## 

### Have fun!
